div1.entryFree: Catechise, to try by questions: what kind of --ing call you this? Ado IV, 1, 79. I must c. you for it, Tw. I, 5, 68. I suck my teeth and c. my picked man of countries, John I, 192. Explained in its original sense (to instruct by questions and appropriate answers): I will c. the world for him, that is, make questions, and by them answer, Oth. III, 4, 16.
